title: senecio doronicum subsp. longifolius
intro: Senecio doronicum subsp. longifolius, also known as yellow ragwort or mountain ragwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Senecio doronicum subsp. longifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Senecio doronicum subsp. longifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
